title: Register with valid email format containing '@' and domain
preconditions: User is on the registration page
No existing account with email 'valid.user@example.com'
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully
The system sends a verification email to 'valid.user@example.com'
A success message is displayed indicating registration is complete and verification email has been sent

title: Register with email missing '@'
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field indicating the email format is invalid (e.g., 'Email must contain @')

title: Register with email missing domain
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field indicating the email format is invalid (e.g., 'Email must contain a domain after @')

title: Register with duplicate email
preconditions: User is on the registration page
An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
expected_results: The system does not create a new user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field indicating the email is already registered (e.g., 'This email is already registered')

title: Register with password length exactly 8 characters
preconditions: User is on the registration page
No existing account with email 'boundary8@example.com'
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully
The system sends a verification email to 'boundary8@example.com'

expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully

title: Register with password length 7 characters

expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the password field indicating the password must be between 8 and 12 characters (e.g., 'Password must be between 8 and 12 characters')

title: Register with password length 13 characters
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the password field indicating the password must be between 8 and 12 characters (e.g., 'Password must be between 8 and 12 characters')

title: Register with password missing uppercase letter

expected_results: The system does not create the user account

expected_results: The system does not create the user account

title: Register with password missing digit

expected_results: The system does not create the user account

title: Register with password missing special character
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating the password must contain at least one special character from the allowed set

title: Register with password containing consecutive spaces
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account

title: Register with password having leading spaces
preconditions: User is on the registration page
No existing account with email 'leadingspace@example.com'
test_steps: Enter ' Abc@123' in the password field
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully because the password with leading spaces meets all other rules
The system sends a verification email to 'leadingspace@example.com'

expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully because the password with trailing spaces meets all other rules
The system sends a verification email to 'trailingspace@example.com'

title: Register with password containing email prefix
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating the password cannot contain the email prefix

title: Verify error message for duplicate email
preconditions: User is on the registration page
An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
expected_results: The system does not create a new user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field, such as 'This email is already registered' or 'Email already exists'

title: Verify error message for invalid email format
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field, such as 'Please enter a valid email address' or 'Invalid email format'

title: Verify error message for invalid password length
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the password field, such as 'Password must be between 8 and 12 characters'

expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully

expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully

preconditions: User is on the registration page
No existing account with email 'singlespace@example.com'
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully
The system sends a verification email to 'singlespace@example.com'

title: Register with password not containing email prefix

No existing account with email 'noprefix@example.com'
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully
The system sends a verification email to 'noprefix@example.com'

title: Register with email containing multiple '@' symbols
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field indicating the email format is invalid (e.g., 'Invalid email format')

title: Register with password containing special character not in allowed set
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating the password must contain at least one special character from the allowed set (e.g., @, #, $, %, ^, &, *)

title: Register with password containing only allowed special characters
preconditions: User is on the registration page
No existing account with email 'allowedspecial@example.com'
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully
The system sends a verification email to 'allowedspecial@example.com'

title: Register with password having both leading and trailing spaces
preconditions: User is on the registration page
No existing account with email 'bothspaces@example.com'
test_steps: Enter ' Abc@123 ' in the password field
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully because the password with leading and trailing spaces meets all other rules
The system sends a verification email to 'bothspaces@example.com'

title: Register with password length 8 characters but missing required character types
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating the password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one digit, and one special character

title: Register with password length 12 characters but missing required character types
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating the password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one digit, and one special character

title: Register with password containing email prefix in different case
preconditions: User is on the registration page
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
An error message is displayed indicating the password cannot contain the email prefix (case-sensitive comparison)

title: Register with email containing spaces
preconditions: User is on the registration page
test_steps: Enter 'user name@example.com' in the email field
expected_results: The system does not create the user account
A meaningful inline error message is displayed next to the email field indicating the email format is invalid (e.g., 'Email cannot contain spaces')

title: Verification link sent immediately after registration
preconditions: User is on the registration page
Email sending service is operational
test_steps: Check the email inbox for the verification email
expected_results: The system creates the user account successfully
A verification email is sent to 'testuser@example.com' within 5 seconds
The email contains a unique verification link with a token
The verification link is not the same as any previously generated link

title: Email sending service failure during registration
preconditions: User is on the registration page
Email sending service is simulated to be down or returns an error
expected_results: The system logs an error indicating the email sending failure
The user sees a message: 'Account created but verification email could not be sent. Please try resending later.'
The user account is created but marked as unverified
The user can request a resend of the verification link

title: Verification link expires after 24 hours
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
System time is manipulated to simulate 24 hours and 1 second passing since registration
test_steps: Click the verification link from the email
expected_results: The system displays an error message: 'Verification link has expired. Please request a new one.'
The user account remains unverified
The user is provided with an option to resend the verification link

title: Clicking expired verification link shows appropriate message
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
The verification link has expired (24 hours have passed)
expected_results: The system displays a message: 'This verification link has expired.'
The page includes a button or link labeled 'Resend Verification Email'
Clicking the resend button triggers the resend functionality

title: Resend verification link after 60-second cooldown
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
User has waited at least 60 seconds since the last verification email was sent
test_steps: Navigate to the resend verification page or click 'Resend Verification Email'
expected_results: The system accepts the resend request
A new verification email is sent to 'resend_user@example.com'
The new verification link is unique and different from the previous one
The 60-second cooldown timer resets

title: Resend verification link within 60-second cooldown is rejected
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
User attempts to resend within 60 seconds of the last email
test_steps: Navigate to the resend verification page
Submit the resend request immediately after the previous one (within 60 seconds)
expected_results: The system rejects the resend request
The user sees an error message: 'Please wait 60 seconds before requesting another verification email.'
No new verification email is sent

title: Multiple rapid resend requests within 1 second
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
User sends 10 resend requests within 1 second
test_steps: Send 10 resend requests for the same email address within 1 second using an automated tool
expected_results: Only the first request is accepted (if it is the first request overall) or all requests are rejected if a cooldown is already active
All subsequent requests return an error: 'Please wait 60 seconds before requesting another verification email.'
Only one verification email is sent (if the first request was accepted)

title: Concurrent resend requests at the same time
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
Two simultaneous resend requests are sent for the same email address
test_steps: Send two resend requests for the same email address at exactly the same time using an automated tool
expected_results: Only one of the requests is accepted
The other request is rejected with an error: 'Please wait 60 seconds before requesting another verification email.'
Only one verification email is sent

title: Unverified user cannot log in
preconditions: User has registered but has not verified their email
expected_results: The system rejects the login attempt
The user sees an error message: 'Please verify your email address before logging in.'
The user is provided with an option to resend the verification email

title: Verification link with tampered token is rejected
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
The token in the verification link is modified (e.g., change one character)
test_steps: Modify the token in the verification link URL
expected_results: The system rejects the verification attempt
The user sees an error message: 'Invalid verification link. Please request a new one.'
The user account remains unverified

title: Verification link with malformed token is rejected
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
The token in the verification link is replaced with a malformed value (e.g., empty string, special characters)
test_steps: Replace the token in the verification link URL with an empty string
Repeat with a token containing only special characters like '!@#$%'
expected_results: The system rejects the verification attempt for both cases
The user sees an error message: 'Invalid verification link. Please request a new one.'
The user account remains unverified

title: Resend cooldown enforced server-side via API manipulation
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
User attempts to bypass the client-side cooldown by sending direct API requests
test_steps: Send a resend request via API immediately after the first email
Send another resend request via API within 60 seconds, bypassing the client-side timer
expected_results: The first API request is accepted (if it is the first request)
The second API request is rejected with an error: 'Please wait 60 seconds before requesting another verification email.'
Only one verification email is sent

title: Verification link expiration enforced server-side
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
System time is manipulated to simulate 24 hours and 1 second passing since registration
User attempts to use the original verification link
test_steps: Click the original verification link after 24 hours and 1 second
expected_results: The system rejects the verification attempt
The user sees an error message: 'Verification link has expired. Please request a new one.'
The user account remains unverified

title: Verification link is unique for each registration
preconditions: Two separate user registrations are performed
test_steps: Register user A with email 'userA@example.com' and password 'UserA@123'
Record the verification link from the email sent to user A
Register user B with email 'userB@example.com' and password 'UserB@456'
Record the verification link from the email sent to user B
expected_results: Both users receive verification emails
The verification links are different and cannot be used interchangeably
Using user A's link for user B's account results in an error

title: Resend verification link exactly at 60 seconds
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
User waits exactly 60 seconds from the time the last verification email was sent
test_steps: Record the timestamp when the last verification email was sent
Submit a resend request for the same email address
expected_results: The system accepts the resend request
A new verification email is sent to the user
The new verification link is unique

title: Resend verification link at 59 seconds
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
User waits 59 seconds from the time the last verification email was sent
test_steps: Record the timestamp when the last verification email was sent
Submit a resend request for the same email address
expected_results: The system rejects the resend request
The user sees an error message: 'Please wait 60 seconds before requesting another verification email.'
No new verification email is sent

title: Verification link valid just before 24 hours
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
System time is manipulated to simulate 23 hours and 59 minutes since registration
expected_results: The system accepts the verification
The user account is marked as verified
The user can log in successfully

title: Verification link invalid exactly at 24 hours
preconditions: User has registered and received a verification link
System time is manipulated to simulate exactly 24 hours since registration
expected_results: The system rejects the verification attempt
The user sees an error message: 'Verification link has expired. Please request a new one.'
The user account remains unverified

title: Verified user can log in successfully
preconditions: User has registered with a valid email and password meeting all rules
User has verified their email within 24 hours via the verification link
User is on the login page
test_steps: Enter the registered email address in the email field
Enter the correct password in the password field
expected_results: The system authenticates the user successfully
The user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
No error messages are displayed
